name: LANwatch
desc: A Rust library and CLI tool for network device discovery and tracking via DHCP, mDNS, SSDP/UPnP, LLMNR, NetBIOS (NBNS), WS-Discovery (WSD), CoAP, Matter, KNXnet/IP, MQTT, Plex GDM, IP Camera discovery (SADP, Dahua, RTSP), link-layer frames (ARP, NDP, LLDP, CDP), and IEEE OUI vendor identification.

name: iManager
desc: Advantech iManager Linux driver set for Advantech Embedded Boards

name: bme280_linux
desc: A high-performance, zero-allocation C++17 driver for the Bosch BME280 humidity, pressure, and temperature sensor. This project demonstrates modern embedded software practices such as hardware abstraction, dependency injection, and deterministic memory usage.

name: memtracer
desc: A lightweight, zero-heap memory allocation, reallocation, and deallocation tracer for C99 and C++11+. It detects leaks and tracks peak memory usage dynamically at runtime, without relying on any heap allocation for its own bookkeeping.

name: whois-rdap
desc: A simple command-line tool to query RDAP servers for IP address information.

name: NetOrigin
desc: NetOrigin is a small Rust CLI for retrieving network ownership data and IP ranges.

name: appid_finder
desc: A Rust-based web application that discovers iOS and Android app bundle IDs instantly.

name: android-appid
desc: A command-line tool written in Rust to find the application ID of an Android app from the Google Play Store.

name: ios-appid
desc: A Rust library and CLI to fetch iOS app information from the iTunes API.
